privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding two employee experience records for a synthetic test employee (Rajesh Kumar, EMP-1001) to the AttendHRM HRMS application. Both specified previous employment companies are verified as real Indian IT services firms: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS, established 1968, major multinational IT services company) and Infosys Limited (founded 1981, one of Big Six Indian IT companies). The employment timelines (TCS 2018-2022 as Senior Software Engineer; Infosys 2015-2018 as Software Engineer) are plausible and consistent with both companies' operations and typical career trajectories in the IT industry. The task uses the AttendHRM application from Lenvica with a Firebird database; the actual database file referenced in installation scripts is DEMO.FDB in C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\, contrary to the metadata path claim.
